pages.confirmDialogTitleSendCourier: {count, plural, one {Send to courier?} other {Send orders to courier?}}
pages.confirmDialogTitleDeleteFromTrashBulk: {count, plural, one {Delete permanently?} other {Delete items permanently?}}

pages.confirmDeleteProductsTrash: {count, plural, one {Move this product to trash? It can be restored within 15 days.} other {Move # products to trash? They can be restored within 15 days.}}
pages.confirmDeleteProductsPermanent: {count, plural, one {Permanently delete this product? This cannot be undone.} other {Permanently delete # products? This cannot be undone.}}
pages.productsMovedToTrashSuccess: {count} product(s) moved to trash. Restore from Trash before they expire.
pages.ordersMovedToTrashSuccess: {count} order(s) moved to trash. Restore from Trash before they expire.
pages.customersEmpty: No customers yet. Customers are created when users register or place orders.

pages.productsListReorderHintActive: Drag the grip handle on the left to reorder. Order is saved when you drop.
pages.productsListReorderHintDisabled: To show reorder handles: pick a category, set sort to Newest, clear search and other filters, and use a category where every product on this list shares the same category (often a leaf category—not a parent that mixes subcategories). You need at least two products on this page.
pages.productsListReorderHintPickCategory: Select a category in the filters to enable reordering (then use the grip handle on the left when it appears).
pages.productsListSelectAllAria: Select all products on this page
pages.productsListStockManagedFromInventoryTit: Stock updates are managed from Inventory.

pages.ordersExportGlobalSelectionBanner: All {count} orders matching the current filters are selected for export (not just this page).
pages.ordersExportExpiresHint: This link expires in about one hour.
pages.ordersExportExpired: This export has expired. Start a new export.
pages.productDetailConfirmDeleteTrash: Move this product to trash? It can be restored within 15 days.
pages.productDetailConfirmDeletePermanent: Permanently delete this product? This cannot be undone.
pages.productSlugFallbackWarning: A similar slug already exists. Using an alternative for SEO.
pages.productStockNewTitle: Initial stock must be set from Inventory after product creation.
pages.productExtraFieldsHintNew: Custom fields defined in Settings → Dynamic Fields.
pages.productExtraFieldsHintEdit: Custom fields from Settings → Dynamic Fields. Values are saved as extra_data on the product (storefront API includes this JSON — your theme must render it).
pages.productUploadHintNew: {max} images max. The first image is always the main product image; add it before adding more. Click a thumbnail to show it in the preview.
pages.productUploadHintEdit: {max} images max. The first image is the main product image. Click a thumbnail to show it in the preview.
pages.productStockManagedInventory: Stock is managed from Inventory only.
pages.productPrepaymentTypeHelp: Customers will be prompted to pay the chosen amount before the order is confirmed.
pages.productEditVariantDescription: This product has {count} variant(s) (SKUs). Inventory is stored per variant; total units (sum of variant stock): {total}.
pages.productFillExtraFields: Please fill in all required extra fields.
pages.categoriesSlugAutoHint: The URL slug is created automatically from the name when you save.
pages.categoriesSlugEditHint: Current URL slug: {slug}. If you change the name and save, it updates automatically.
pages.categoriesEmpty: No categories yet. Add a root category to get started.
pages.categoriesConfirmDelete: Delete this category? Subcategories are removed with it (database cascade).
pages.inventoryOutOfStockFilterAria: Show only out of stock items
pages.inventoryEmpty: No inventory records found. Products and variants will appear here when stock tracking is enabled.
pages.bannersImagesHint: Up to {max} images per banner (replace or remove per slot).
pages.bannersKeepImageHint: Leave empty to keep current image
pages.bannersEmpty: No banners yet. Click Add Banner to create one.
pages.shippingZonesEmptyHint: Leave empty to apply to all zones.
pages.ctaEndAfterStartInvalid: End date/time must be after start date/time.

pages.variantsSubtitleBefore: SKUs and options per product. Define option types under

pages.variantsLoadVariantsFailed: Could not load variants for this product.
pages.variantsSkuPlaceholder: The server assigns a permanent SKU when you save. It cannot be changed afterward.
pages.variantsPriceOverridePlaceholder: Uses product base price if empty
pages.variantsNoAttributes: No attributes yet. Add some under

pages.variantsChooseProduct: Choose a product to manage its variants.
pages.attributesSubtitleBefore: Option types and values used on variants (e.g. Color → Red, Blue). Then assign them on

pages.attributesConfirmDeleteAttr: Delete attribute "{name}" and all its values?
pages.attributesDeleteAttrFailed: Delete failed (attribute may be in use).
pages.attributesDeleteValueFailed: Delete failed (value may be linked to variants).
pages.attributesEmpty: No attributes yet. Create one (e.g. "Color", "Size"), then add values.
pages.activitiesSubtitle: Admin actions across products, orders, support tickets, notifications and more.
pages.trashSubtitle: Removed products and orders stay here until they expire (15 days) or you delete them forever.
pages.trashForbidden: Only store owners and admins can open trash.
pages.trashConfirmPermanent: Permanently delete this item and any stored files? This cannot be undone.

pages.notificationsEmpty: You're all caught up. No notifications yet.

sidebar.searchStartHint: Type to search products, orders, customers, and tickets.
sidebar.twoFaSwitchPrompt: Enter your 2FA code to switch stores:

planNotActive.title: Plan not active
planNotActive.body: Your account does not have an active subscription. Please subscribe or contact support before continuing.

dashboardLayout.subscriptionVerifyBody: We could not verify your account status right now. Please try reloading. If the issue continues, contact support.
dashboardLayout.noSubscriptionBody: Your account does not have an active plan. Please contact support to activate a subscription before accessing the dashboard.
dashboardLayout.graceBannerText: Subscription expiring soon. Renew now. Time left: {time}
dashboardLayout.expiredBannerPayError: Could not start checkout. Try again or pick a plan.
dashboardLayout.paymentPendingBannerText: Your payment is pending. It will go live after approval.
dashboardLayout.pendingReviewBannerText: Your store is under review. It will go live after approval.
dashboardLayout.inactivePlanBannerText: Your plan is inactive. Your store is not live. Choose a plan to enable API access.
dashboardLayout.rejectedPlanBannerText: Your last subscription request was not approved. You can choose a new plan or contact support.
dashboardLayout.serverUnreachableBody: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection or try again later.

dashboard.title: {greeting}, {name} 👋
dashboard.subtitle: Here’s a detailed overview of what’s currently happening in your store, including recent activities and important updates.
dashboard.chartNoActivity: No activity for the selected period.
dashboard.serverUnreachable: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection or try again later.

auth.turnstileHumanPrompt: Let us verify you are a human
auth.turnstileRequired: Please complete the verification challenge before continuing.

login.title: Login
login.headline: Backend made simple.
login.description: No database setup. No backend headaches. Just connect and build your frontend.
login.twoFactorDescription: Enter your verification code to continue securely.
login.serverUnreachable: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection or try again later.
login.recoveryEmailRequired: Please enter your account email first.
login.recoveryEmailNotFound: No user with that email was found for this login session.
login.recoverySent: Recovery code sent to your email
login.recoverySendFailed: Could not send recovery code. Try again later.
login.invalidOtp: Invalid verification code. Please try again.

signup.title: Create account
signup.subtitle: Sign up to get started with your store
signup.headline: Start building, not configuring.
signup.description: Set up your backend in seconds and focus on what actually matters - your product.
signup.twoFactorDescription: Enter your verification code to continue securely.
signup.invalidOtp: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
signup.termsPrefix: By signing up you agree to our
signup.termsAgreementPlain: By creating an account, you agree to our Terms & Service and Privacy Policy

passwordReset.title: Reset password
passwordReset.subtitle: Enter your account email and we'll send you a reset link.
passwordReset.headline: Reset your password securely.
passwordReset.description: Enter your account email and we'll send you a reset link.
passwordReset.sendFailed: Could not send reset email. Please try again.
passwordReset.logoutAllDevices: Log out from all other devices
passwordReset.sentBody: If an account exists with that email, we've sent a password reset link.
passwordReset.successBody: Your password has been successfully reset.
passwordReset.confirmSubtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
passwordReset.invalidLinkBody: This password reset link is missing required parameters. Open the link from your email or request a new reset.
passwordReset.linkInvalidSubmit: This reset link is invalid or incomplete. Request a new one.
passwordReset.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

onboarding.headlineDescription: A quick guided setup to launch your store with confidence.
onboarding.introDescription: Paperbase is a backend-as-a-service for stores. Launch faster without backend complexity.
onboarding.appsIntro: Catalog, Orders, Shipping, and Inventory are always enabled. Choose additional apps for your store:
onboarding.twoFaRequired: 2FA code is required to switch stores.
onboarding.createStoreFailed: Failed to create store. Please try again.
onboarding.prompt2fa: Enter your 2FA code to activate this store:

verifyEmail.failedHint: Request a new link from the signup flow or contact support.
verifyEmail.checkBody: We've sent a verification link to your email address. Please check your inbox.
verifyEmail.emailHint: Enter your signup email to request a new verification link.
verifyEmail.resendHint: Didn't receive the email? Check spam or resend.
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: If the email exists, verification link has been sent.
verifyEmail.emailRequiredResend: Email address is required to resend verification.
verifyEmail.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Your control center for store owners. Manage your store identity, products, orders, integrations, and more.

account.heading: Account
account.subtitle: Owner information for this store.
account.emailReadonlyHint: Your email address cannot be changed from the dashboard. Contact support if you need to update it.

store.heading: Store Info
store.subtitle: Your store identity. Powers frontend, invoices, and emails.
store.storeTypeHint: Category or type of your store. Max 4 words.
store.socialSubtitle: Public URLs for your storefront footer or header (Facebook, Instagram, etc.). Saved with your store settings.
store.validationStoreType: Store type must be at most 4 words.
store.validationContactEmail: Please enter a valid contact email.
store.validationPhone: Phone number must start with 01 and be exactly 11 digits.

customization.heading: Customization
customization.subtitle: Set your storefront language and choose a color palette. Changes apply to the live storefront.
customization.languageSaveFailed: Could not update language. Try again.
customization.saveFailed: Could not save theme. Try again.
customization.paletteUnderDevelopment: Under development — not available to select yet.

dynamicFields.heading: Dynamic Fields
dynamicFields.subtitle: Define custom extra fields for products. They appear on product create and edit forms and are stored in each product's extra data via the API.

panel.msgCompleteFields: Complete existing fields before adding new ones.
panel.fixedHint: These fields are always present on products and cannot be removed.
panel.extraHint: Define custom extra fields for products. They appear in product create and edit forms. Values are persisted via the backend API on each product's extra_data.
panel.duplicateNames: Field names must be unique. Please fix duplicate names.

apps.heading: Apps
apps.subtitle: Control which data models and features are available in your store. Essential apps are always enabled.

products.label: Products
products.description: Product catalog; categories, variants, and attributes are always available with it

orders.label: Orders
orders.description: Order management, status flow, and fulfillment

banners.label: Banners
banners.description: Manage banners for homepage, sidebar, footer

blog.label: Blog
blog.description: Publish blog posts and manage categories and tags

integrations.heading: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect marketing and delivery tools to your store. More integrations are added over time.

networking.heading: Networking
networking.subtitle: Create API keys to authenticate storefront API requests and WebSocket connections for this store. Setting up a new store does not issue a key—you create keys here when you are ready to integrate.
networking.subscriptionExpiredNotice: Your subscription has expired. Renew your plan to create new API keys and copy the storefront integration prompt.
networking.storeUnderReviewNotice: Your store is under review. API key actions and the storefront integration prompt are disabled until your subscription is approved and the storefront goes live.
networking.lockedBody: Your subscription is inactive. Please activate to create API keys and enable storefront integrations.
networking.msgCreated: API key created. Save it now; it will not be shown again.
networking.confirmCreate: Create a new API key now?
networking.confirmRegenerate: Regenerate this API key? The old key will be revoked.
networking.msgRegenerated: API key regenerated. Save the new key now; it will not be shown again.
networking.noKeys: No API keys yet. Create one below before using the storefront or headless API.
networking.storefrontPromptHint: Copy the full Markdown prompt for AI-assisted storefront or headless frontends. Paste it into your assistant with your API key and base URL.
networking.promptCopiedDescription: Storefront API prompt is on your clipboard.
networking.promptCopyFailed: Could not copy to clipboard. Check browser permissions.
networking.apiKeyCopiedDescription: API key is on your clipboard.
networking.apiKeyCopyFailed: Could not copy API key. Check browser permissions.

notifications.heading: Notification preferences
notifications.subtitle: Choose which events should generate notifications in the top bar.
notifications.emailHint: Control when emails are sent for order events. Order email alerts are a Premium feature.
notifications.emailOwnerOnOrder: Email me when an order is received
notifications.emailCustomerCourier: Email customer when the order is sent to courier

security.heading: Security
security.subtitle: Manage your password and sign-in protection for this account.
security.changePasswordHint: Update your password to keep your account secure.
security.logoutAllDevices: Log out from all other devices
security.disableHint: To disable 2FA, confirm with your password and current OTP.
security.recoveryBody: If you cannot access your authenticator device, you can request a recovery code via email.
security.setupScanHint: Scan the QR code, then enter the OTP to enable 2FA.
security.recoverySent: Recovery code sent to your email
security.recoverySendFailed: Could not send recovery code. Try again later.
security.disableFailed: Failed to disable 2FA. Check password and OTP code.
security.passwordChangeFailed: Failed to change password. Check your current password.
security.modalChangePasswordDescription: Update your password to keep your account secure.
security.modalEnable2faDescription: Use an authenticator app to protect your account.
security.modalEnable2faStartHint: Generate a QR code and secret, then enter the code from your app.
security.modalRecoveryDescription: If you cannot access your authenticator device, request a recovery code by account email.

billing.heading: Billing & Plan
billing.subtitle: Current plan and subscription period from your account.

dataExport.heading: Data & Export
dataExport.subtitle: Export and data tools for your store will appear here.

marketing.heading: Facebook Conversions API (CAPI)
marketing.intro: This integration is Meta’s server-side Conversions API (CAPI): Paperbase sends events from the server to Meta for measurement. Provide your Dataset ID plus a CAPI access token from Meta Events Manager. Credentials are stored only on your store.
marketing.accessTokenPlaceholder: Meta Conversions API access token (Events Manager)
marketing.alreadyConnected: Facebook CAPI is already connected. Disconnect the existing integration first to add another.
marketing.empty: No Facebook Conversions API (CAPI) connection yet.
marketing.confirmDisconnect: Disconnect Facebook CAPI from this store?
marketing.connectFailed: Could not connect Facebook CAPI. Check Dataset ID and access token.
marketing.modalConnectDescription: Enter your Dataset ID and Conversions API access token from Events Manager. Optional: test event code for staging.
marketing.modalConfigureDescription: Choose which events Paperbase sends to Meta via CAPI. Each toggle saves immediately.
marketing.modalDisconnectDescription: Stops sending server-side events to Meta until you connect again.

tiktok.heading: TikTok Events API
tiktok.intro: Connect TikTok’s server-side Events API: Paperbase sends web events from the server to TikTok for measurement. Add your Pixel Code and an Events API access token. Credentials are stored only on your store. (Browser TikTok Pixel is not used; this is server-side only.)
tiktok.pixelHelper: Found in TikTok Ads Manager > Assets > Events > Web Events > Pixel
tiktok.pixelPlaceholder: e.g. your pixel ID from Events
tiktok.accessTokenHelper: Generate in TikTok Events Manager > Set Up Web Events > Events API > Generate Access Token
tiktok.testEventHelper: Optional. Use during testing to verify events in TikTok Events Manager
tiktok.alreadyConnected: A TikTok Events API integration is already connected. Disconnect the existing one first to add another.
tiktok.empty: TikTok Events API is not connected yet.
tiktok.connectFailed: Could not connect TikTok Events API. Check pixel code and access token.
tiktok.modalConnectDescription: Enter your TikTok Pixel Code and Events API access token. Optional: test event code to verify in TikTok Events Manager.
tiktok.modalConfigureDescription: Your pixel code, token mask, and event options when available.
tiktok.modalDisconnectDescription: Stops sending server-side events to TikTok until you connect again.

courier.heading: Courier Integration
courier.intro: Connect Steadfast (Packzy) to send orders from the dashboard. Credentials are stored in Paperbase only until you dispatch. You need the API key and secret key from the Packzy portal.
courier.saveFailed: Failed to save courier settings. Check the form and try again.
courier.modalConnectDescription: Enter your Packzy API key and secret. Credentials stay in Paperbase until you dispatch orders.
courier.modalDisconnectDescription: You will stop sending orders through this integration until you connect again.

billingSuccess.title: Subscription activated
billingSuccess.body: Payment receipt sent to your email.

plansPage.title: Choose a plan
plansPage.subtitle: Select the plan that works for your store. Payment is manual via bKash or Nagad.
plansPage.empty: No plans are available right now. Please contact support.
plansPage.errorLoad: Failed to load plans. Please refresh the page.
plansPage.initiateError: Failed to initiate payment. Please try again.

checkoutPage.title: Complete your payment
checkoutPage.selectPaymentSubtitle: Select bKash or Nagad to continue.
checkoutPage.sendMoneyBodyBkash: Open your bKash app, choose Send Money, and send the exact amount above to the number below.
checkoutPage.sendMoneyBodyNagad: Open your Nagad app, choose Send Money, and send the exact amount above to the number below.
checkoutPage.termsNotice: By clicking on Confirm, you are agreeing to the terms and conditions.
checkoutPage.instructionsBody: Copy a number, send the exact amount shown above, then fill in your transaction details below.
checkoutPage.billingMonthlyHelp: This price is per month. You are paying for the next billing month.
checkoutPage.billingYearlyHelp: This price is per year. One payment covers the next 12 months.
checkoutPage.submitError: Submission failed. Please check your transaction ID and try again.
checkoutPage.submittedBody: We have received your transaction ID. Our team will verify and activate your subscription within a few hours. You will be notified by email.
checkoutPage.successBody: We have received your transaction ID. Our team will verify and activate your subscription within a few hours. You will be notified by email.

orderSuccess.title: Order placed successfully
orderSuccess.body: A confirmation email has been sent to the address you provided.

errors.notFoundBody: The page you’re looking for doesn’t exist or may have been moved.
